news.headline: SEC dismisses appeal in crypto rulemaking case, signaling a shift under President Trump. Appeal was voluntarily dismissed on Wednesday.
news.summary: Under President Trump, the SEC is entering a new phase as the regulator chose to withdraw its appeal on Wednesday in a crypto rulemaking case. This decision comes as a significant move reflecting the changing landscape in regulatory actions. Details on the specific case, including important numbers, were not provided.

news.headline: Smith Douglas Homes (NYSE: SDHC) to release Q4 2024 results on March 12, 2025, followed by conference call at 8:30 AM ET.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company Smith Douglas Homes Corp. (NYSE: SDHC) is set to announce its Q4 2024 financial results on Wednesday, March 12, 2025, before the market opens. A conference call will be held on the same day at 8:30 AM Eastern Time for discussing the results and hosting a Q&A session. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing the provided numbers or by accessing a webcast link available in the investor relations section.

news.headline: Sabra Health Care REIT reports Q4 2024 results: Net income $0.19 per diluted share, FFO $0.36. EBITDARM coverage: SNF/Transitional Care 2.09x, Senior Housing 1.36x.
news.summary: TUSTIN, California - Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. (Nasdaq: SBRA) disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024. The results per diluted common share in Q4 2024 were: Net Income: $0.19, FFO: $0.36, Normalized FFO: $0.35, AFFO: $0.36, and Normalized AFFO: $0.36. The EBITDARM coverage summary for the quarter showed Skilled Nursing/Transitional Care at 2.09x and Senior Housing - Leased at 1.36x. The company also highlighted recent events without providing specific details.

news.headline: Vimeo releases Q4 and annual 2024 shareholder letter on its IR site. Key information available at https://www.vimeo.com/investors.
news.summary: Vimeo released its shareholder letter for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on their website's investor relations page. The information was made public on February 19, 2025. Investors and interested parties can access the letter at vimeo.com/investors for details on the company's performance during the specified period.

news.headline: Stronghold Digital Mining urges stockholders to vote "FOR" the merger with Bitfarms at the special meeting on Feb. 27. ISS and Glass Lewis recommend the merger.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, Stronghold Digital Mining, Inc. (NASDAQ: SDIG) revealed that Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) and Glass Lewis & Co. have advised Stronghold stockholders to vote "FOR" the proposed merger with Bitfarms Ltd. (NASDAQ/TSX: BIT) at the special meeting on February 27, 2025. The merger is set to be a significant move for both companies, with Bitfarms being a prominent player in the industry. This announcement comes as a crucial step towards finalizing the merger, highlighting the growing support for the union between Stronghold and Bitfarms.

news.headline: Mister Car Wash announces Q4 ‘24 & full year results; record revenue & EBITDA; facing consumer challenges.
news.summary: In Tucson, Arizona, Mister Car Wash, Inc. (Nasdaq: MCW), the largest car wash brand in the U.S., disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company expressed contentment with their fourth-quarter and full-year 2024 performance. Despite consumer challenges and heightened competition, Mister Car Wash achieved record revenue and EBITDA. The company noted an improvement in results as the year advanced. This progression was achieved amidst a tough consumer climate and increased market competition.

news.headline: Holley Performance Brands (NYSE: HLLY) to announce Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 11, 2025 at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: Holley Performance Brands, a renowned automotive aftermarket performance solutions company trading on NYSE under the ticker symbol HLLY, has disclosed the scheduled announcement date for their financial performance in the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The unveiling of Holley's financial results for Q4 and FY 2024 will take place on Tuesday, March 11, 2025, at 8:30 am (Eastern Time). A conference call and live webcast have been organized by the company to delve into the details of their financial standing during that period. This event will be crucial for investors and stakeholders to gain insights into the company's financial health and strategic outlook moving forward.

news.headline: Carvana reports record earnings for Q4 and FY 2024, becoming most profitable US automotive retailer. Shareholder letter for details.
Herbalife's Q4 net sales hit $1.2 billion, meeting guidance at high end, with 0.6% decline from Q4 ‘23. Adjusted EBITDA exceeds expectations.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Herbalife Ltd. (NYSE: HLF) released its financial figures for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. The Chairman and CEO, Michael Johnson, expressed positivity about the company’s achievements, highlighting three consecutive quarters of new distributor growth, a new CEO incoming, and significantly enhanced Adjusted EBITDA margins. The fourth quarter of 2024 saw net sales of $1.2 billion, indicating a decrease of 0.6% compared to Q4 of 2023, aligning with the upper range of projected guidance. This figure encompasses 330 basis points of FX impacts.

news.headline: Agilent declares 24.8 cents per share dividend; payable on April 23, 2025, for shareholders on record by April 1.
news.summary: Agilent Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: A), based in Santa Clara, California, declared a quarterly dividend of 24.8 cents per common stock share. This dividend is set to be disbursed on April 23, 2025, to all shareholders recorded by April 1, 2025. The company's board of directors retains the authority to decide on the timing and value of upcoming dividends. Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) focuses on analytical technologies and is a prominent player in the global market.

news.headline: GitLab CEO Bill Staples & CFO Brian Robins to speak at Morgan Stanley conference in San Francisco on March 5, 2025. Webcast link provided.
news.summary: GitLab Inc., a leading AI-powered DevSecOps platform traded on NASDAQ as GTLB, revealed that their CEO, Bill Staples, and CFO, Brian Robins, will participate in a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in San Francisco on March 5, 2025. The event is set for 1:50 p.m. Pacific Time and can be viewed via live webcast at the provided link.

news.headline: Financial comparison website NerdWallet reveals its Q4 and 2024 full-year performance data.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that due to the ongoing pandemic, there has been a significant increase in unemployment rates across the country. The latest data shows that more than 20 million individuals have filed for unemployment benefits in the past few weeks, indicating the severity of the economic impact caused by the crisis. This surge in job loss has led to a nationwide unemployment rate of over 14%, the highest seen in several decades. The situation has prompted government officials to implement various relief measures to support those affected, including stimulus packages and expanded unemployment benefits. Despite these efforts, the road to economic recovery remains uncertain as the situation continues to evolve.

news.headline: Enovix (Nasdaq: ENVX) reported its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024 in Fremont, California.
news.summary: Enovix Corporation, a high-performance battery company based in Fremont, California, and listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ENVX, released its financial figures for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 19, 2025. The President and CEO, Dr. Raj Talluri, provided a summary of the results.

news.headline: IMAX Corp. (NYSE: IMAX) reports strong Q4 & full-year 2024 results, highlighting success during Chinese New Year.
news.summary: IMAX Corporation (NYSE: IMAX) recently announced strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2024, showcasing the strength of its global entertainment platform and extensive content offerings. The company highlighted its success during Chinese New Year, achieving record-breaking numbers that underscore the benefits of its diversified content portfolio spanning major Hollywood releases and local language blockbusters. With a vast global network in place, IMAX has effectively leveraged its position to maximize box office revenue.

news.headline: Klaviyo (NYSE: KVYO) reports $1 billion revenue run rate in Q4 and fiscal year 2024. Strong Black Friday Cyber Monday performance.
news.summary: In Boston, Klaviyo (NYSE: KVYO) revealed its performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024. The company achieved significant milestones, surpassing a $1 billion revenue run rate. It marked a successful Black Friday Cyber Monday period and showcased robust growth throughout 2024, underscoring the importance of its intelligent data platform. Klaviyo serves over 167,000 customers, demonstrating its impact on driving growth and fostering digital relationships. Andrew, the spokesperson, emphasized the success and pivotal role of the platform in facilitating these achievements.

news.headline: Amplitude reports strong 2024 financial results. CEO notes success in customer adoption and enterprise progress.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Amplitude, Inc. (Nasdaq: AMPL), a top digital analytics platform, shared its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. CEO and co-founder Spenser Skates noted, "Amplitude finished 2024 on a high note. Our approach to platform development is gaining traction with clients, especially in the enterprise sector." Skates added, "Businesses require three essentials: reliable data, insights into customer behavior, and an...

news.headline: Pinterest CEO Bill Ready will speak at Morgan Stanley Conference on March 6, 2025, 8:30 a.m. PST. Webcast available.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE: PINS) shared that CEO Bill Ready will engage in the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 6th, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. PST / 11:30 a.m. EST. The presentation will be live-streamed and available for replay on Pinterest’s Investor Relations site at investor.pinterest.com. The company utilizes this platform for disclosure purposes and plans to persist in doing so.

news.headline: SkyWater Technology (NASDAQ: SKYT) moves up release date of Q4 financial results to Feb 26 before market open.
news.summary: BLOOMINGTON, Minnesota - SkyWater Technology (NASDAQ: SKYT), a leading technology realization partner, has revealed that they will release their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 earlier than expected. Due to numerous semiconductor industry companies reporting their results on Wednesday afternoon, February 26th, SkyWater Technology opted to reschedule their financial report and webcast to be available before the market opens on the same day. The webcast link previously provided will remain the same for easy access to the information. Stay tuned for SkyWater Technology's fiscal fourth-quarter results.

news.headline: Farmland Partners Inc. reported full-year 2024 results, with net income of $61.5 million and AFFO of $14.1 million.
Calavo Growers (CVGW) to announce Q1 2025 financial results on March 12 after market close.

Investors and analysts are eagerly anticipating these results to gauge the company's performance during this period. news.headline: Clearwater Paper Corp (NYSE: CLW) to attend Bank of America conference on Feb 27, 2025 in Ft Lauderdale; CEO Arsen Kitch to speak.

The company's President and CEO, Arsen Kitch, is scheduled to address the conference, with the additional presence of Senior VP and CFO Sherri Baker. They will be open for individual and small group investor discussions on the same day. Clearwater Paper Corporation operates in the paper and pulp industry.

news.headline: Rocky Brands, Inc. will report Q4 and Full Year 2024 results on Feb. 25, 2025. Conference call at 4:30 PM ET. Phone: (877) 704-4453.
news.summary: Ohio-based footwear company Rocky Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: RCKY) will unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024, after the market closes on Tuesday, February 25, 2025. Interested investors and analysts can join the call by dialing (877) 704-4453 for domestic callers or (201) 389-0920.

news.headline: Toast reveals Q4 and full year 2024 financial performance, showing strong growth in revenue and profit.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global economy is projected to grow by approximately 6% in 2021, which would mark the fastest expansion in almost five decades. The significant acceleration is largely attributed to the successful rollout of COVID-19 vaccines and unprecedented levels of government stimulus. The United States is expected to lead the recovery with a growth forecast of around 6.9%, while China is anticipated to expand by 8.4%. These encouraging figures come after a 3.5% contraction in the global economy in 2020, highlighting a remarkable turnaround in a relatively short period. However, the report also emphasizes the unequal nature of the recovery, warning that low-income countries continue to face significant challenges and are at risk of falling further behind. Therefore, policymakers are urged to implement strategies that promote a more inclusive and sustainable recovery for all nations.

news.headline: Pinstripes Holdings reports Q3 Fiscal 2025 results: Revenue up 10.4% to $35.5M, food/beverage revenues up 10.5% to $27.5M.
news.summary: Northbrook, Illinois-based Pinstripes Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PNST), a leading experiential dining and entertainment brand offering bistro, bowling, bocce, and event space, disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending on January 5, 2025. In the third quarter of fiscal 2025, the company witnessed significant growth, with total revenue rising by 10.4% to $35.5 million compared to the same period in the previous year. Specifically, food and beverage revenues experienced a notable increase of 10.5% amounting to $27.5 million. This positive trajectory underscores Pinstripes' strong market presence and consumer appeal.

news.headline: Rectitude sends inaugural AIMS products to Singapore, boosting green energy solutions; company aims for wider reach.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, Rectitude Holdings Ltd., operating under Nasdaq with the symbol RECT, a company based in Singapore specializing in safety equipment and related industrial products, shared that it has effectively distributed its initial batch of All-in-One Intelligence Micro-grid System (AIMS) to consumers in Singapore. This delivery signifies the first introduction of the product in Singapore, demonstrating the company's dedication to promoting sustainable energy solutions in Southeast Asia.

news.headline: Herbalife appoints Stephan Gratziani as CEO effective May 1, 2025. Michael Johnson to transition to Executive Chairman.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Herbalife Ltd. revealed that Stephan Gratziani, the current President, would take over as Chief Executive Officer (CEO) on May 1, 2025. Michael Johnson, the existing CEO and Chairman of the Board, will become the Executive Chairman. Gratziani, a former Herbalife independent distributor, successfully expanded his international business to become one of the premier global distributorships over 32 years.

news.headline: Middleby Corp (NASDAQ: MIDD) to release Q4 earnings on Feb 25 at 7am EST. Conference call scheduled for 8am EST. Details: www.middleby.com. Call: 1-844-481-3012.
news.summary: Elgin, Illinois – The Middleby Corporation (NASDAQ: MIDD) is set to announce its 2024 fourth-quarter earnings on Tuesday, February 25 at 7 a.m. ET. A conference call to review the results is scheduled for 8 a.m. ET on the same day. Interested parties can access the call via the Investor Relations page on the company's homepage at www.middleby.com. Alternatively, participants can join by dialing 1-844-481-3012 for domestic callers, or +1 [insert international dial-in number] for international participants.

news.headline: Albertsons Companies priced $600 million senior notes at 6.250% due 2033 in a private offering.
news.summary: Albertsons Companies, based in Boise, Idaho, has confirmed the pricing of its private offering of $600 million in total principal amount of its 6.250% senior notes set to mature in 2033.

news.headline: Starbucks' 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on March 12, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Pacific Time will be held virtually.
news.summary: Seattle-based Starbucks Coffee Company (NASDAQ: SBUX) has announced that its Annual Meeting of Shareholders is scheduled for Wednesday, March 12, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. PT. This meeting will be conducted virtually and can be accessed through the company’s website at investor.starbucks.com. Shareholders and guests who were shareholders as of January 10, 20 are eligible to vote at the Annual Meeting, as detailed in the company’s proxy materials. This update was shared by the company.

news.headline: Tanger (NYSE: SKT) reports Q4, Full Year 2024 results and 2025 guidance; acquired 2 shopping centers.
news.summary: In North Carolina, Tanger (NYSE:SKT), a prominent owner and operator of outlet and open-air retail shopping spots, shared its financial results and operating figures for the quarter and year ending on December 31, 2024. Highlighting accomplishments, they noted enhanced sales productivity and significant organic growth throughout the period. The company's successful year was further evidenced by the acquisition of two open-air shopping centers, specifically The Promenade at Chenal in Little Rock.

news.headline: NOG reports 2024 results, offers 2025 guidance in press release from Minneapolis.
news.summary: In Minneapolis, NOG recently released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company reported revenues of $X for the quarter, leading to a yearly revenue of $Y. Additionally, NOG outlined its plans for 2025 in detail, offering guidance for the upcoming year.

news.headline: Grindr (NYSE: GRND) to release Q4 2024 earnings on March 5, 2025. Website to post details for shareholders.
news.summary: Grindr Inc. (NYSE: GRND), known as the Global Gayborhood in Your Pocket™, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. The announcement is slated for after market hours on Wednesday, March 5, 2025. Grindr intends to issue a press release upon posting its Shareholder Letter on its Investor Relations webpage at investors.grindr.com. Subsequent to the publication of the Shareholder Letter, Grindr will conduct a webcasted conference call.

news.headline: Rogers Corp (NYSE: ROG) reports Q4 and full year 2024 results, noting declining sales due to seasonal factors and market challenges. CEO remains optimistic.
news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona, Rogers Corporation (NYSE:ROG) shared their financial outcomes for the entirety of 2024 and the fourth quarter. Colin Gouveia, the President and CEO of Rogers, declared that the results aligned with their predictions for the fourth quarter. Sales saw a descent as expected, attributed to reduced sales in portable electronics seasonally and decreased revenues from wireless infrastructure and industrial sectors. While facing difficulties in the macro and market environments which affected the total year sales, Rogers remained committed to their strategies.

news.headline: SEG Solar and Talon PV partner to boost American solar manufacturing with Talon supplying N-type solar cells.
news.summary: In Houston on February 19, 2025, SEG Solar and Talon PV revealed a significant partnership. SEG Solar, a top manufacturer of photovoltaic modules in the U.S., will collaborate with Talon PV, a U.S.-based solar cell manufacturer. This alliance will involve Talon providing high-performance N-type solar cells to SEG. This collaboration marks a strategic move in the solar energy industry.

news.headline: Chewy to participate in Morgan Stanley conference on March 5, 2025 at 7:45 AM PT - CFO David Reeder to join. Webcast available on company's investor relations website.
news.summary: Chewy, Inc., a leading pet products retailer listed as CHWY on the NYSE, revealed that their Chief Financial Officer, David Reeder, will be engaging in a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 5, 2025, at 7:45 AM PT. Access to a live audio webcast of the event is available on the company’s investor relations website at https://investor.chewy.com. Moreover, a replay of the chat will be accessible for 90 days post the event.

news.headline: Realty Income (NYSE: O) raises common stock dividend by 1.5% to $0.268 per share from $0.264 per share.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, Realty Income Corporation (NYSE: O) disclosed an uptick in its common stock monthly cash dividend to $0.268 per share from $0.264 per share. The dividend is set to be paid out to shareholders and is part of the company's commitment as "The Monthly Dividend Company®."

news.headline: Sealed Air (NYSE: SEE) declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share payable on March 28, 2025.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - On February 19, 2025, Sealed Air (NYSE: SEE) revealed that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per common share. Shareholders will receive this dividend on March 28, 2025, if they are recorded as stockholders by the end of business on March 14.

news.headline: Applied Materials introduces SEMVision™ H20 system for chip defect review, combining eBeam tech and AI.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, on February 19, 2025, Applied Materials, Inc. unveiled its latest innovation, the SEMVision™ H20 defect review system, aimed at assisting top semiconductor manufacturers in advancing chip scaling. This cutting-edge system harnesses the most sensitive eBeam technology in the industry alongside AI image recognition. By providing improved and quicker analysis of hidden nanoscale defects in the most sophisticated chips globally, this technology sets a new standard.

news.headline: Penumbra stock surges after earnings beat. Q4 sales reach $315.52M, with adjusted EPS of 97 cents and global thrombectomy product sales increased by 15.4%. Operating income at $42.8M, net income at $33.7M.
news.summary: Penumbra Inc (NYSE:PEN) saw an uptick in trading following a strong fourth-quarter earnings report. The medical device company posted an adjusted EPS of 97 cents, surpassing last year's 76 cents and beating the expected 90 cents. Sales for the quarter totaled $315.52 million, marking a 10.8% increase from the previous year and exceeding the expected $311.55 million. Global thrombectomy product sales in Q4 reached $220.1 million, a 15.4% rise in reported and constant currency, while U.S. sales saw a 27.3% increase. Embolization and access product revenues reached $95.4 million globally, showing a 1.6% increase or 1.5% growth in constant currency. U.S. revenue for this segment was up by 8.9%. Operating income hit $42.8 million, with adjusted operating income at $48.6 million. Net income for Q4 stood at $33.7 million, and adjusted EBITDA was reported at $63.7 million, with margins of 10.7% and 19.8%, respectively. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: TFI International reveals Q4 & full-year 2024 results, reported in U.S. dollars. Leader in transportation & logistics industry.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, TFI International Inc., a prominent company in the transportation and logistics sector in North America, disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. The results are presented in U.S. dollars and the company's stock is listed on both the NYSE and TSX under the ticker symbol TFII.

news.headline: GRI Bio implements reverse stock split to reduce outstanding shares and raise stock's price.
news.summary: There has been a significant increase in COVID-19 cases in the city, with a total of 500 new cases reported in the past week. This brings the total number of confirmed cases in the city to 2,000, with 300 active cases currently being monitored. The rise in cases has prompted local authorities to enforce stricter safety measures, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and limitations on social gatherings. Residents are urged to follow health guidelines to curb the spread of the virus and protect the community.

news.headline: PacBio to present at TD Cowen's Health Care Conference on March 4, 2025, at 3:10 PM ET in Boston.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Menlo Park, California, PacBio (NASDAQ: PACB), a top provider of precise sequencing solutions, revealed that its executives will speak at TD Cowen's 45th Annual Health Care Conference on March 4, 2025, at 3:10 PM ET (12:10 PM PT) in Boston, MA.

news.headline: ACV reported Q4 revenue of $160M, full-year revenue of $637M. Expects 2025 revenue of $765M-$785M, GAAP net income (loss) of ($62M)-($52M), and Adjusted EBITDA of $65M-$75M with growth exceeding 20%.
news.summary: ACV, a digital automotive marketplace, reported a strong fourth quarter with revenue of $160 million, a 35% increase YoY, and full-year revenue of $637 million. Despite a GAAP net loss in the fourth quarter ($26 million), the non-GAAP net income was positive at $1 million. Adjusted EBITDA for the quarter was $6 million. For 2025, ACV expects revenue to reach $765-$785 million, a growth of 20-23% YoY. They anticipate a GAAP net loss of ($62)-($52) million and Adjusted EBITDA of $65-$75 million. The company is confident in sustainable market share gains and strong revenue growth backed by their expanding dealer solutions suite. Investors are encouraged to make period-to-period comparisons using the provided non-GAAP financial measures to understand the company's performance. Additionally, ACV aims to transform the automotive industry by providing trusted digital marketplace solutions.

news.headline: Amplify Energy to release Q4 2024 numbers on March 5, followed by conference call on March 6 at 10:00 a.m. CT.
news.summary: Houston based Amplify Energy Corp., listed as AMPY on NYSE, will release its Q4 2024 financial and operating outcomes on March 5, 2025, post the close of U.S. financial markets. The management is scheduled to hold a conference call on March 6, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. CT to discuss the company's performance. To join the call, interested individuals can dial (888) 999-5318 with Conference ID: AEC4Q24 at least 15 minutes before the call begins. Those who miss the live discussion can access a replay by dialing (800) 654-1563 with Access Code: 71724906 within fourteen days. Furthermore, a transcript and recorded replay will be accessible on the company website post the call.

news.headline: Pulmonx Corporation (Nasdaq: LUNG) posts record Q4 and FY 2024 financial results on Feb. 19th, 2025.
news.summary: In Redwood City, California, on February 19, 2025, Pulmonx Corporation (Nasdaq: LUNG), a prominent provider of minimally invasive lung disease treatments, announced its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Reliance, Inc. reported strong financial results with $1.43B cash flow, $13.84B annual sales, EPS of $15.56, 4 acquisitions in 2024, and record $1.09B in share repurchases.
news.summary: Reliance, Inc. reported its financial results for Q4 2024 and full year 2024, with $13.84 billion in annual net sales and $1.43 billion in cash flow from operations. They repurchased a record $1.09 billion in common stock in 2024, reducing outstanding shares by 6%. The annual EPS was $15.56, and they completed four acquisitions. They increased the quarterly dividend by 9.1% to $1.20 per share. Tons sold were up 4.0%, with a 29.7% gross profit margin. The Company improved quarterly operating results, with non-GAAP FIFO gross profit margin at 28.8%. They provided a business outlook for 2025, expecting modest demand improvement. Reliance repurchased approximately 3.9 million shares in 2024. They generated $1.43 billion in cash flow from operations and increased the quarterly dividend to $1.20 per share. The Company's Board of Directors promoted Brenda Miyamoto to Senior Vice President, Strategic Planning & Programs. The Company remains optimistic about its future performance.

news.headline: Joe Christina has been appointed as President and COO of Noodles & Company to drive operational excellence.
news.summary: A highly successful restaurant industry expert has recently joined Noodles & Company to enhance operational performance. This experienced leader brings a wealth of knowledge to the company, aiming to drive excellence in operations. This strategic move is expected to significantly impact the organization's overall efficiency and effectiveness.

news.headline: Remitly exceeds expectations in Q4 2024 with 32% increase in active customers, 33% revenue growth, $5.7M net loss, $43.7M EBITDA.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter, there was a significant increase of 32% in active customers and a revenue surge of 33% compared to the previous year. However, the company reported a net loss of $5.7 million during the same period. On a positive note, the Adjusted EBITDA stood at $43.7 million, showcasing a stronger financial performance.

news.headline: Armada Hoffler Properties reported Q4 2024 results: GAAP net income of $0.26 per diluted share, normalized FFO of $0.27, introducing 2025 FFO guidance of $1.00-$1.10.364M net rentable sq ft leased, NOI growth 12.3% (GAAP). CEO transition Jan 2025. Financials: $30.9M net income for the full year, $1,297.5M total debt outstanding. Asset values and earnings increased.
news.summary: Armada Hoffler Properties, Inc. reported a GAAP net income of $0.26 per diluted share for the fourth quarter and $0.33 per diluted share for the full year. Normalized FFO was $0.27 per diluted share for the fourth quarter and $1.29 per diluted share for the full year. The company saw Office Same Store NOI growth of 12.3% (GAAP) and positive spreads on renewals across all segments. Approximately 315K net rentable square feet of new and renewed commercial lease space was introduced. The Company provided a 2025 full-year Normalized FFO guidance range of $1.00 to $1.10 per diluted share. As of December 31, 2024, the Company had $1,297.5 million of total debt outstanding, with 94% of it fixed or economically hedged after considering interest rate swaps. Total construction contract backlog was $123.8 million as of December 31, 2024. The Company's report indicated strong financial performance and positive growth across its various segments, with a focus on sustainable growth and maintaining financial strength.

news.headline: Revolution Medicines will release Q4, full year 2024 financial results on Feb. 26, 2025, through webcast at 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: Revolution Medicines, Inc., a company focused on developing targeted therapies for RAS-addicted cancers, will release its financial results for Q4 and full-year 2024 on February 26, 2025, after the market closes. This announcement came from their headquarters in Redwood City, California. The webcast, scheduled for 4:30 p.m. ET (1:30 p.m. PT) on the same day, will feature senior management discussing the financial results and providing corporate updates. Revolution Medicines is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol RVMD.
